packageRules.description: @holz/* packages use a fixed-mode versioning scheme. Update them together.
The flake owns the pnpm version (managePackageManagerVersions is off); the packageManager field is only a turbo lockfile-parser hint, kept in sync by hand. Skip its bump PRs.
@iconify/json releases far too often to bump every time. Batch its updates onto a twice-monthly cadence.
turbo releases too often to bump every time. Batch its updates onto a twice-monthly cadence.
